stemHtml: An aircraft is on stand awaiting departure clearance at an airport with severe weather conditions. The aircraft has been anti-iced and the hold-over time (HOT) has not yet expired. According to the clean aircraft concept, what should the commander do?

options.a: Request a full de-icing and anti-icing procedure.
options.b: Visually inspect the wings from inside the plane before the take-off run.
options.c: Visually inspect the wings from the outside of the aircraft when at the de-icing bay.
options.d: Wait for the hold-over time to expire before taking any action.
